About S3XY Detailers

Driven by passion. Defined by detail.

We understand the unique surfaces, materials, and design philosophy that make every Tesla special. From routine maintenance washes to paint preservation, every visit is performed with patience, precision, and products we trust on our own vehicles. Our mission is simple: Protect. Preserve. Perfect.

Personaly when I bought my first Tesla I told myself I will do everything to give this car my love and attention. The more love I put into it the more I got out of it.

Our mission: to enhance, protect, and preserve the beauty of your vehicle.
